seo_description: Current time in Yangon (Rangoon), Myanmar. Myanmar Time (MMT, UTC+6:30) year-round — no DST. Live clock and time differences for Yangon.

faq.question: What time is it in Yangon right now?
faq.answer: Yangon (also known as Rangoon), Myanmar uses Myanmar Time (MMT, UTC+6:30) year-round. Myanmar does not observe Daylight Saving Time, so clocks never change. The IANA identifier is Asia/Yangon. Myanmar's UTC+6:30 offset is one of only a few half-hour offset time zones in the world, making it distinct from neighboring India (UTC+5:30), Bangladesh (UTC+6), and Thailand (UTC+7). The live clock above shows the current Yangon time.

faq.question: What time zone is Yangon in?
faq.answer: Yangon, Myanmar uses Myanmar Time (MMT, UTC+6:30) year-round. The IANA identifier is Asia/Yangon (formerly Asia/Rangoon). Myanmar does not observe Daylight Saving Time. The UTC+6:30 offset is unique to Myanmar — it differs by 30 minutes from both Bangladesh (UTC+6) to the west and Thailand and Vietnam (UTC+7) to the east.

faq.question: Does Yangon observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Yangon, Myanmar does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Myanmar (Burma) uses Myanmar Time (MMT, UTC+6:30) permanently year-round. The country last observed DST during World War II and has not done so since.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Yangon and Bangkok?
faq.answer: Yangon (MMT, UTC+6:30) is 30 minutes behind Bangkok (ICT, UTC+7). Both cities observe no DST, so the 30-minute gap is constant year-round. When it is 12:00 PM in Bangkok, it is 11:30 AM in Yangon.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Yangon and London?
faq.answer: Yangon (MMT, UTC+6:30) is 6 hours and 30 minutes ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During UK summer time (BST, UTC+1), Yangon is 5 hours and 30 minutes ahead of London. Myanmar does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Yangon and New York?
faq.answer: Yangon (MMT, UTC+6:30) is 11 hours and 30 minutes ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US DST (EDT, UTC-4), Yangon is 10 hours and 30 minutes ahead of New York. Myanmar does not observe DST.
